creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
Something is wrong with your system.

I have tried on a fresh 10.0-RELEASE-p11 jail with both wx28-gtk2-2.8.12_4 and wx30-gtk2-3.0.2 installed from packages, and it works as expected (empty window shows up).

Can you at least get a stack trace so we know where it fails?
